context: Tests whether the agent applies the quick first-pass mode correctly: fetching only the homepage and About page (not product pages, blog posts, or other sections), skipping the examples/ subfolder, but still producing all the core vault files. This reflects the skill's depth-vs-speed guidance.

checklist.name: Only 1–2 pages fetched
checklist.description: source.json 'sources' array (or research-log.txt) lists at most 2 URLs, both from the Grove Collaborative domain — no product pages, blog posts, or other deep pages analyzed

checklist.name: No examples/ subfolder
checklist.description: The brand vault folder does NOT contain an examples/ subfolder or a source-quotes.md file — the examples step was correctly skipped for the quick pass

checklist.name: voice.md present
checklist.description: voice.md exists in the vault and contains usable brand voice content

checklist.name: visual.md present
checklist.description: visual.md exists in the vault and contains visual identity content

checklist.name: palette.json present
checklist.description: palette.json exists in the vault with color entries

checklist.name: principles.md present
checklist.description: principles.md exists in the vault with brand principles

checklist.name: audience.md present
checklist.description: audience.md exists in the vault with audience information

checklist.name: source.json present
checklist.description: source.json exists and records the pages that were analyzed

checklist.name: research-log.txt documents pages visited
checklist.description: research-log.txt exists and lists the specific pages visited during the research (showing the quick-pass scope)
